events.title: Evening Figure Drawing
events.description: Figure Drawing sessions every second Tuesday of the month. Draw a live model for 2.5 hours. $10 donation at the door. Chairs provided, bring your own drawing materials/board/easel. Open session, all skill levels welcome. Must be over 18.

events.title: Morning Figure Drawing at Artspace
events.description: Figure Drawing sessions every third Tuesday of the month. Draw a live model for 2 hours. $10 donation at the door. Chairs provided, bring your own drawing materials/board/easel. Open session, all skill levels welcome. Must be over 18.

events.title: 18+ Figure Drawing: March Session
events.description: Ongoing nude figure drawing series open to all artists 18+. March session is a long pose session featuring a single model. Tickets must be purchased in advance; space is limited. No photos allowed.

events.title: 18+ Figure Drawing: April Session
events.description: Ongoing nude figure drawing series open to all artists 18+. April session is a short pose session featuring a single model, ideal for quick sketches and gestural drawings. Tickets must be purchased in advance; space is limited. No photos allowed.
